name: Carthage Limousine & Sedan
recent_news: No M&A or growth news found. FMCSA DOT# 2265773 registered as Carthage Limousine & Sedan Services. Operates as small limo/sedan service in Falls Church VA area, not a school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Tiny limousine/sedan operator (3 employees, ~$225K rev), not a school-bus/student-transport contractor. No school district contracts identified.

name: Challenge Limosne & Sedan Svc

fit_notes: Not a fit. Single-vehicle/owner-operator limousine and sedan service (3 employees). No school-bus fleet or district contracts. Out of scope for Summit tuck-in strategy.

name: Destiny Trnsportaion Group LLC
recent_news: Multiple unrelated 'Destiny Transportation' companies exist nationally (CA charter, refrigerated freight, Sacramento). A 'Destiny Transportation LLC' is listed in Herndon VA (adjacent to Reston). No school district contracts or school-bus operations identified.
fit_notes: Not a fit. Small ground-transportation operator with 3 employees and ~$225K revenue. No evidence of school-bus fleet, SPED routing, or district contracts. Out of scope.
